completion_criteria_checked: A local helper exists that drafts an advisor restart brief from canonical repo truth.
The helper uses current project/task state plus verified artifact paths as its primary inputs.
The generated brief clearly tells a fresh advisor what the project is, what task is active, what was last verified, what to read first, and what happens next.
The change stays within the approved V1 scope and preserves local deterministic behavior.
The helper stays within the approved V1 scope and uses local deterministic logic.
Claude returns evidence in .cockpit/result/worker-result.md using the required format.
risks: Live state is still not validated against JSON Schema at runtime.
The local validator still does not prove that the live worker directive matches fresh generator output.
Timestamp formatting across multiple PowerShell helpers could drift again if future scripts interpolate JSON datetimes without a shared formatter.
summary: Claude completed the bounded pcc-v1-006 task within scope by adding a deterministic advisor restart brief generator that rehydrates a fresh advisor session from canonical truth and verified artifacts.
next_action: Advance to the next bounded task: prove fresh worker-session restart safety from canonical repo truth, then follow with a combined dual-restart drill.
